modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Can't access timesheets in the experience portal.

full_description_text: So, the user was trying to check their timesheets, right? But they just can't see them at all. They said something about not being able to enter their hours for the month and got an error saying "External System ID not found." It's really frustrating for them!
short_description: Can't access timesheets in the experience portal.
description: So, the user was trying to check their timesheets, right? But they just can't see them at all. They said something about not being able to enter their hours for the month and got an error saying "External System ID not found." It's really frustrating for them!
